message:
feat(brenner-loop): add failure mode analytics module

Implements failure analytics for tracking hypothesis failure patterns:
- Domain-level failure distribution (requires MIN_SAMPLE_SIZE of 3)
- Operator correlation analysis (shows which operators help/hurt)
- Structural pattern detection (8 built-in patterns)
- Automated insight generation with severity levels
- Human-readable summary function

Types: FailureMode, DomainFailureDistribution, OperatorFailurePattern,
StructuralPatternFailure, FailureAnalytics, FailureInsight

Tests: 14 comprehensive test cases covering all functionality

Part of brenner_bot-4lv6 (Failure Mode Learning)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1135,3 +1135,27 @@ export {
   PHASE_COACHING,
   LEVEL_THRESHOLDS,
 } from "./coach-context";
+
+// ============================================================================
+// Failure Mode Analytics (bead 4lv6)
+// ============================================================================
+
+export type {
+  // Core types
+  FailureMode,
+  DomainFailureDistribution,
+  FailureModeOccurrence,
+  OperatorFailurePattern,
+  StructuralPatternFailure,
+  FailureAnalytics,
+  FailureInsight,
+} from "./failure-analytics";
+
+export {
+  // Pattern detectors
+  STRUCTURAL_PATTERNS,
+
+  // Core analytics
+  computeFailureAnalytics,
+  summarizeFailureAnalytics,
+} from "./failure-analytics";
